title: phyllanthus praetervisus
intro: Phyllanthus praetervisus, also known as the 'False Phyllanthus' or 'False Phyllanthus of the mountains', is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various liver and kidney disorders due to its hepatoprotective and nephroprotective properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus praetervisus include its ability to aid in detoxification, improve liver function, and help manage conditions such as jaundice and cirrhosis. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often made from the leaves and roots of the plant.
